## Problem

## Proposed change

<!-- What would you add, remove, or restructure at the workspace level? -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This change is workspace-only (Makefile, CI, top-level docs, submodule wiring)
- [ ] If accepted, it does *not* require coordinated changes inside submodules
      (if it does, list which submodules and link discussion issues)

## Alternatives considered

## ADR

If this proposal sets a workspace-wide convention (Podman vs. Docker, release
policy, branch model, etc.), an ADR will be filed in
`project-hub/docs/docs/architecture/adr/` once accepted.
